gemini-3-flash-preview.description: Gemini 3 Flash Preview prompted audio transcription
gemini-3-flash-preview.pricingNotes: Gemini 3 Flash Preview Standard paid pricing is $1.00/1M audio input tokens, $0.50/1M text/image/video input tokens, and $3.00/1M output tokens. The hourly estimate is the audio-input baseline using 32 audio tokens/sec from the Gemini token docs; completed runs record usageMetadata-based token billing when returned. Free tier, batch/flex/priority prices, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

limits.notes: Gemini inline audio requests are kept safely under the 20 MB inline request limit; larger inputs use the Files API. Audio input is tokenized at 32 tokens/second, and final billed cost also includes prompt and output tokens.
